title: hieracium pilosum subsp. portae
intro: Hieracium pilosum subsp. portae is a subspecies of the Hieracium pilosum plant, commonly known as the woolly hawk's-beard or hairy hawk's-beard. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium pilosum subsp. portae is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
